message:
Implement complete SearchClient with Tantivy query execution

Replaced SearchClient stub implementation with full-featured query execution
against the Tantivy full-text search index. This enables the TUI to perform
real searches with text queries, agent filtering, and time range filtering.

SearchClient architecture:

1. Construction via open()
   - Opens existing Tantivy index from filesystem path
   - Returns Ok(None) if index doesn't exist (graceful degradation)
   - Extracts schema and constructs Fields using fields_from_schema() helper
   - Creates long-lived IndexReader for concurrent read access
   - Stores Fields reference for type-safe document field access

2. Member fields
   - reader: IndexReader - enables concurrent searches without writer lock
   - fields: Fields - provides type-safe handles to schema fields

SearchFilters enhancement:

3. Changed agents from Vec<String> to HashSet<String>
   - Automatic deduplication of agent filter values
   - More semantically correct (set of unique agents, not ordered list)
   - Slightly more efficient for iteration (no duplicate TermQuery instances)

4. Added time range filtering
   - created_from: Option<i64> - Unix timestamp lower bound (inclusive)
   - created_to: Option<i64> - Unix timestamp upper bound (inclusive)
   - Both optional, allowing open-ended ranges

Query execution implementation:

5. Text search via QueryParser
   - Searches across both title and content fields
   - Parses user query string with Tantivy's query parser
   - Supports Tantivy query syntax (phrases, boolean operators, etc.)
   - Only added to query if input is non-empty (trimmed)

6. Agent filtering with BooleanQuery
   - Constructs TermQuery for each agent in the HashSet
   - Combines with Occur::Should (OR logic - match any agent)
   - Wraps in Must clause (intersection with text query)
   - Example: search for "error" from agents {"codex", "cline"} finds
     messages containing "error" from either codex OR cline

7. Time range filtering with RangeQuery
   - Uses Bound::Included for inclusive range endpoints
   - Uses Bound::Unbounded for open-ended ranges
   - Maps Option<i64> to appropriate Bound variant
   - Term::from_field_i64 constructs range boundary terms
   - Only added to query if at least one bound is Some

8. Query optimization
   - Empty clauses → AllQuery (match all documents, e.g., no filters)
   - Single clause → unwrap and use directly (avoid unnecessary BooleanQuery)
   - Multiple clauses → BooleanQuery with Must occurrence
   - Reduces query tree depth for better performance

9. Result extraction
   - TopDocs collector with configurable limit
   - Iterates scored results: (f32 score, DocAddress)
   - Fetches document from searcher by address
   - Extracts field values with unwrap_or("") fallbacks
   - Constructs SearchHit with title, snippet, score, source_path
   - Snippet uses first line of content (simple preview)

Import organization:

10. std imports first (collections, ops, path)
11. External crates second (anyhow, tantivy)
12. Local crate imports last (crate::search::tantivy)
13. Alphabetically sorted within each group

Dependencies:

- Requires public fields_from_schema() from tantivy.rs (previous commit)
- Requires public Fields struct (earlier commit)
- Requires IndexReader availability in tantivy module

This implementation provides the core search functionality for the TUI.
Future enhancements could add:
- Workspace filtering (TermQuery on workspace field)
- Message index filtering (RangeQuery on msg_idx field)
- Highlighted snippets (Tantivy snippet generation)
- Faceted search (count results by agent/workspace)
- Sort by date instead of relevance score
